audience: stranger-readable public walkthrough of deterministic local artifacts
reader_prompts: Which assumption would you inspect first, and which artifact records it?
Which boundary prevents this walkthrough from becoming a recommendation?
Can another reviewer regenerate the same artifact set from local files?
title: Public Valuation Scenario Casebook

walkthrough.summary: Example Components Inc. has a weighted fair value of USD 37.38 across 3 local scenarios.
6 reusable scenario cards across 2 fictional companies document the assumption set.
Deterministic local-assumption research brief; no action recommendation.
10 command steps connect source fixtures to public artifacts.
Audit status is fail for artifact, schema, dependency, manifest, and boundary checks.
